name: Dominari Holdings Inc.
summary: Dominari Holdings Inc. is a Delaware holding company engaged in wealth management, investment banking, sales and trading, asset management, and insurance through its subsidiaries. Its primary operating subsidiary, Dominari Securities LLC, is a dually registered broker-dealer and investment adviser serving high-net-worth individuals, families, corporate executives, and businesses. The company also manages series funds through Dominari Master SPV LLC and American Ventures LLC, and is winding down legacy biotechnology assets held by Dominari Labs, LLC.

products.name: Full-Service Brokerage
products.description: Brokerage services covering equities, debt securities, options, municipal bonds, mutual funds, ETFs, and unit investment trusts.

products.name: Wealth Planning
products.description: Financial and wealth planning including asset management, retirement solutions, insurance, annuities, IRAs, 401(k) plans, and trust services.

products.name: Investment Banking - Financial Advisory
products.description: Advisory services for M&A, divestitures, spin-offs, restructurings, and liability management for emerging growth and middle market businesses.

products.name: Equities Capital Markets
products.description: Capital raising solutions including IPOs, follow-on offerings, private placements, registered directs, and at-the-market offerings.

products.name: Debt Capital Markets
products.description: Plans to offer public and private debt structuring for leveraged buyouts, acquisitions, recapitalizations, and exit financings.

products.name: Fund Placement
products.description: Strategic and tactical advisory, primary fundraises, co-investments, and direct transactions for alternative investment firms.

products.name: Private Equity SPVs
products.description: Special purpose vehicles pooling investor capital into private equity opportunities in emerging technology, med-tech, defense, and AI sectors.

products.name: Dominari Master SPV Series Funds
products.description: Series of funds under Dominari Master SPV LLC for making investments in companies alongside third-party investors.

products.name: American Ventures LLC Series Funds
products.description: Series funds under AV Master SPV for making investments in companies identified by AV Investment Manager alongside third-party investors.

partnerships.description: Sold its wholly owned broker-dealer subsidiary FPS (later renamed Dominari Securities LLC) to Dominari Financial in two closings in 2022 and 2023.
